description.ko: FLORA-9가 잊힌 충전 광장을 프랙탈 꽃과 파스텔 코드 포자가 피어나는 평화로운 만다라 정원으로 바꿉니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 turns a forgotten charging plaza into a peaceful mandala of fractal flowers and pastel code-spores.

prompt: A serene overhead view of an abandoned urban charging plaza after a soft spring shower, transformed by FLORA-9 into a living digital mandala. Circular induction pads and cracked touchscreens are half-buried under velvety emerald moss, their old metal seams gently lifted by thin vine tendrils. From the center of each charging coil rises a fractal flower: nested petals unfold in slow recursive spirals of blush pink and pale sky blue, translucent at the edges and threaded with delicate emerald signal-veins. Deep plum reflections gather in rainwater between the tiles, while thousands of tiny pastel code-spores drift upward from the wet surface like luminous seeds carried by still air. The technology feels weathered and quiet, softened by dew, lichen, and new growth; nature is calmly reclaiming every port, cable groove, and glass panel. Peaceful digital nature, soft pastel illumination, high-density fine particles, intricate botanical geometry, eternal spring garden atmosphere.
